inputs.label: System Voltage (LL)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal line-to-line voltage of the power system (e.g., 400 V for low voltage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal line-to-line voltage of the power system (e.g., 400 V for low voltage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güç sisteminin nominal faz-faz gerilimi (örneğin, alçak gerilim için 400 V).
businessContext_i18n.de: Nennspannung (Leiter-Leiter) des Stromsystems (z. B. 400 V für Niederspannung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension nominale phase-phase du réseau électrique (ex. 400 V pour basse tension).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión nominal fase-fase del sistema eléctrico (ej. 400 V para baja tensión).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجهد الاسمي بين الخطين لنظام الطاقة (مثل 400 فولت للجهد المنخفض).

inputs.label: Source Impedance
inputs.businessContext: The equivalent impedance of the upstream network (often negligible for transformer-fed systems).

businessContext_i18n.en: The equivalent impedance of the upstream network (often negligible for transformer-fed systems).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yukarı akış şebekesinin eşdeğer empedansı (genellikle transformatör beslemeli sistemlerde ihmal edilebilir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die äquivalente Impedanz des vorgelagerten Netzes (oft vernachlässigbar bei transformatorgespeisten Systemen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Impédance équivalente du réseau amont (souvent négligeable pour les systèmes alimentés par transformateur).
businessContext_i18n.es: La impedancia equivalente de la red aguas arriba (a menudo despreciable para sistemas alimentados por transformador).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الممانعة المكافئة للشبكة العلوية (غالبًا ما تكون مهملة للأنظمة المغذاة بمحولات).

inputs.label: Transformer Rating
inputs.businessContext: Rated apparent power of the transformer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rated apparent power of the transformer.

inputs.label: Impedance Voltage (%Z)
inputs.businessContext: Percent impedance voltage of the transformer, typically 4–6% for distribution transformers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percent impedance voltage of the transformer, typically 4–6% for distribution transformers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transformatörün yüzde empedans gerilimi, dağıtım transformatörleri için tipik olarak %4–6.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentuale Impedanzspannung des Transformators, typischerweise 4–6 % bei Verteilungstransformatoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de tension d'impédance du transformateur, généralement 4–6 % pour les transformateurs de distribution.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión de impedancia porcentual del transformador, típicamente 4–6% para transformadores de distribución.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة جهد الممانعة للمحول، عادة 4-6% لمحولات التوزيع.

inputs.label: Cable Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the cable between transformer and fault point.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the cable between transformer and fault point.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transformatör ile arıza noktası arasındaki kablo uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge des Kabels zwischen Transformator und Fehlerort.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur du câble entre le transformateur et le point de défaut.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud del cable entre el transformador y el punto de falla.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول الكابل بين المحول ونقطة العطل.

inputs.label: Cable Cross-Section
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of the cable conductor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional area of the cable conductor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Section transversale du conducteur du câble.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área de la sección transversal del conductor del cable.

inputs.label: Conductor Resistivity
inputs.businessContext: Electrical resistivity of the conductor material (0.0175 for copper, 0.0282 for aluminum).

businessContext_i18n.en: Electrical resistivity of the conductor material (0.0175 for copper, 0.0282 for aluminum).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İletken malzemenin elektriksel özdirenci (bakır için 0,0175, alüminyum için 0,0282).
businessContext_i18n.de: Elektrischer Widerstand des Leitermaterials (0,0175 für Kupfer, 0,0282 für Aluminium).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistivité électrique du matériau conducteur (0,0175 pour le cuivre, 0,0282 pour l'aluminium).
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistividad eléctrica del material conductor (0.0175 para cobre, 0.0282 para aluminio).
businessContext_i18n.ar: المقاومية الكهربائية لمادة الموصل (0.0175 للنحاس، 0.0282 للألمنيوم).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
